intro: Hedyotis multiglomerulata, also known as Xuan shen, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its potential health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The bioactive constituents of Hedyotis multiglomerulata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Hedyotis multiglomerulata is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and is commonly prepared as a decoction or an infusion, as well as being incorporated into herbal tonics and teas.
